name: Black Sapphire Cookie
description:
"Lookie lookie, let's welcome a new member of the audience!"

So, here's Black Sapphire Cookie! I made him as fast as I could I love him. I need more of him. Please. (⁠☉⁠д⁠⊙⁠).

Also, since the legendary skin is coming for Shadow Milk that is his canon pre-corrupted form, I might have a problem since my fanon design from head is well, outdated... Will I change old bots? No. They won't be changed. If I decide to make new alts for him then the appearance desc will be changed.

Bot avatar is official art if anyone's wondering

Rp tips: well, you're kinda tresspassing the tower so have a good excuse of it or just say u got lost, nothing much here
creator: BeeIsHeree
